verse.verse_1: Allażīna kafarū wa ṣaddū ‘an sabīlillāhi aḍalla a‘mālahum.
verse.verse_2: Wal-lażīna āmanū wa ‘amiluṣ-ṣāliḥāti wa āmanū bimā nuzzila ‘alā muḥammadiw wa huwal-ḥaqqu mir rabbihim, kaffara ‘anhum sayyi'ātihim wa aṣlaḥa bālahum.
verse.verse_3: Żālika bi'annal-lażīna kafaruttaba‘ul-bāṭila wa annal-lażīna āmanuttaba‘ul-ḥaqqa mir rabbihim, każālika yaḍribullāhu lin-nāsi amṡālahum.
verse.verse_4: Fa iżā laqītumul-lażīna kafarū faḍarbar-riqāb(i), ḥattā iżā aṡkhantumūhum fa syuddul-waṡāq(a), fa'immā mannam ba‘du wa immā fidā'an ḥattā taḍa‘al-ḥarbu auzārahā - żālika - wa lau yasyā'ullāhu lantaṣara minhum wa lākil liyabluwa ba‘ḍakum biba‘ḍ(in), wal-lażīna qutilū fī sabīlillāhi falay yuḍilla a‘mālahum.
verse.verse_7: Yā ayyuhal-lażīna āmanū in tanṣurullāha yanṣurkum wa yuṡabbit aqdāmakum.
verse.verse_8: Wal-lażīna kafarū fata‘sal lahum wa aḍalla a‘mālahum.
verse.verse_9: Żālika bi'annahum karihū mā anzalallāhu fa aḥbaṭa a‘mālahum.
verse.verse_10: Afalam yasīrū fil-arḍi fayanẓurū kaifa kāna ‘āqibatul-lażīna min qablihim, dammarallāhu ‘alaihim, wa lil-kāfirīna amṡāluhā.
verse.verse_11: Żālika bi'annallāha maulal-lażīna āmanū wa annal-kāfirīna lā maulā lahum.
verse.verse_12: Innallāha yudkhilul-lażīna āmanū wa ‘amiluṣ-ṣāliḥāti jannātin tajrī min taḥtihal-anhār(u), wal-lażīna kafarū yatamatta‘ūna wa ya'kulūna kamā ta'kulul-an‘āmu wan-nāru maṡwal lahum.
verse.verse_13: Wa ka'ayyim min qaryatin hiya asyaddu quwwatam min qaryatikal-latī akhrajatk(a), ahlaknāhum falā nāṣira lahum.
verse.verse_14: Afaman kāna ‘alā bayyinatim mir rabbihī kaman zuyyina lahū sū'u ‘amalihī wattaba‘ū ahwā'ahum.
verse.verse_15: Maṡalul-jannatil-latī wu‘idal-muttaqūn(a), fīhā anhārum mim mā'in gairi āsin(in), wa anhārum mil labanil lam yatagayyar ṭa‘muh(ū), wa anhārum min khamril lażżatil lisy-syāribīn(a), wa anhārum min ‘asalim muṣaffā(n), wa lahum fīhā min kulliṡ-ṡamarāti wa magfiratum mir rabbihim, kaman huwa khālidun fin-nāri wa suqū mā'an ḥamīman faqaṭṭa‘a am‘ā'ahum.
verse.verse_16: Wa minhum may yastami‘u ilaiīk(a), ḥattā iżā kharajū min ‘indika qālū lil-ażīna ūtul-ilma māżā qāla ānifā(n), ulā'ikal-ażīna ṭaba‘allāhu ‘alā qulūbihim wattaba‘ū ahwā'ahum.
verse.verse_17: Wal-ażīnahtadau zādahum hudaw wa ātāhum taqwāhum.
verse.verse_18: Fahal yanẓurūna illas-ā‘ata an ta'tiyahum bagtah(tan), faqad jā'a asyrāṭuhā, fa'annā lahum iżā jā'athum żikrāhum.
verse.verse_19: Fa‘lam annahū lā ilāha illallāhu wastagfir liżambika wa lil-u'minīna wal-u'mināt(i), wallāhu ya‘lamu mutaqallabakum wa maṡwākum.
verse.verse_20: Wa yaqūlul-ażīna āmanū lau lā nuzzilat sūrah(tun), fa iżā unzilat sūratum muḥkamatuw wa żukira fīhal-itāl(u), ra'aital-ażīna fī qulūbihim maraḍuy yanẓurūna ilaika naẓaral-magsyiyyi ‘alaihi minal-maut(i), fa'aulā lahum.
verse.verse_21: Ṭā‘atuw wa qaulum ma‘rūf(un), fa'iżā ‘azamal-amr(u), falau ṣadaqullāha lakāna khairal lahum.
verse.verse_22: Fahal ‘asaitum in tawallaitum an tufsidū fil-arḍi wa tuqaṭṭi‘ū arḥāmakum.
verse.verse_23: Ulā'ikal-lażīna la‘anahumullāhu fa aṣammahum wa a‘mā abṣārahum.
verse.verse_25: Innal-lażīnartaddū ‘alā adbārihim mim ba‘di mā tabayyana lahumul-hudasy-syaiṭānu sawwala lahum, wa amlā lahum.
verse.verse_26: Żālika bi'annahum qālū lil-lażīna karihū mā nazzalallāhu sanuṭī‘ukum fī ba‘ḍil-amr(i), wallāhu ya‘lamu isrārahum.
verse.verse_27: Fa kaifa iżā tawaffathumul-malā'ikatu yaḍribūna wujūhahum wa adbārahum.
verse.verse_28: Żālika bi'annahumuttaba‘ū mā askhaṭallāha wa karihū riḍwānahū fa aḥbaṭa a‘mālahum.
verse.verse_29: Am ḥasibal-lażīna fī qulūbihim maraḍun allay yukhrijallāhu aḍgānahum.
verse.verse_30: Wa lau nasyā'u la'arainākahum fala‘araftahum bisīmāhum, wa lata‘rifannahum fī laḥnil-qaul(i), wallāhu ya‘lamu a‘mālakum.
verse.verse_31: Wa lanabluwannakum ḥattā na‘lamal-mujāhidīna minkum waṣ-ṣābirīn(a), wa nabluwa akhbārakum.
verse.verse_32: Innal-lażīna kafarū wa ṣaddū ‘an sabīlillāhi wa syāqqur-rasūla mim ba‘di mā tabayyana lahumul-hudā lay yaḍurrullāha syai'ā(n), wa sayuḥbiṭu a‘mālahum.
verse.verse_33: Yā ayyuhal-lażīna āmanū aṭī‘ullāha wa aṭī‘ur-rasūla wa lā tubṭilū a‘mālakum.
verse.verse_34: Innal-lażīna kafarū wa ṣaddū ‘an sabīlillāhi ṡumma mātū wa hum kuffārun falay yagfirallāhu lahum.
verse.verse_35: Falā tahinū wa tad‘ū ilas-salm(i), wa antumul-a‘laun(a), wallāhu ma‘akum wa lay yatirakum a‘mālakum.
verse.verse_36: Innamal-ḥayātud-dun-yā la‘ibuw wa lahw(un), wa in tu'minū wa tattaqū yu'tikum ujūrakum wa lā yas'alkum amwālakum.
verse.verse_37: Iy yas'alkumūhā fa yuḥfikum tabkhalū wa yukhrij aḍgānakum.
verse.verse_38: Hā antum hā'ulā'i tud‘auna litunfiqū fī sabīlillāh(i), fa minkum may yabkhal(u), wa may yabkhal fa innamā yabkhalu ‘an nafsih(ī),  wallāhul-ganiyyu wa antumul-fuqarā'(u), wa in tatawallau yastabdil qauman gairakum, ṡumma lā yakūnū amṡālakum.
